name: Neon Dark
description: High-contrast dark theme with electric neon accents. For agent dashboards, cyber UIs, and spatial interfaces.

decorators.neon-card: Dark card with neon cyan border glow, 1px solid border, and box-shadow using primary at 30% opacity.
decorators.neon-badge: Compact pill badge with neon fill color, dark text, and subtle glow shadow matching the badge color.
decorators.neon-input: Dark input with thin neon border, glowing focus ring in primary cyan, dark surface background.
decorators.neon-grid-line: Subtle grid pattern overlay at 5% opacity using thin lines for cyberpunk dashboard aesthetic.

neon-card.description: Dark card with neon cyan border glow, 1px solid border, and box-shadow using primary at 30% opacity.
neon-card.intent: Use for data panels and dashboard widgets. The neon glow border creates the cyberpunk dashboard aesthetic.

neon-badge.description: Compact pill badge with neon fill color, dark text, and subtle glow shadow matching the badge color.
neon-badge.intent: Use for status indicators and category labels. Neon fill with dark text creates high-contrast readability on dark surfaces.

neon-input.description: Dark input with thin neon border, glowing focus ring in primary cyan, dark surface background.
neon-input.intent: Use for form inputs in dark dashboards. The neon focus ring provides clear visibility against the dark background.

neon-grid-line.description: Subtle grid pattern overlay at 5% opacity using thin lines for cyberpunk dashboard aesthetic.
neon-grid-line.intent: Use as a background overlay on dashboard pages. The grid pattern adds the cyberpunk spatial interface feel.
